title: The BATTLE of FEET
content: Event Date: 16th March 2024 "The Battle of Feet" is not just a dance competition; it's an immersive experience that celebrates the artistry, creativity, and passion of dancers from around the world. Set in the picturesque backdrop of a lush green field, this event offers a unique and enchanting ambiance that sets it apart from traditional dance competitions. Dancers of all styles and backgrounds are invited to participate in this exhilarating battle, where they can showcase their talents and push the boundaries of their art. Whether you're a classical ballet dancer, a hip-hop aficionado, or a contemporary artist, "The Battle of Field" welcomes you to share your unique style and creativity on stage. The competition is divided into several categories, each showcasing a different style of dance. From solo performances to group routines, participants have the opportunity to compete in a variety of formats and categories, allowing them to showcase their skills and versatility. Mentor Name – Ms. Ambika Gupta, Ms. Pragya Tewari, Ms. Kimmi Gupta Department Name – Department of Computer Science & Engineering
